recommendations.title: Love Tactics
recommendations.overview: An ad executive and a fashion designer-blogger don't believe in love, so they place a bet to make the other fall head over heels - with unusual tactics.

recommendations.title: Picture Perfect
recommendations.overview: A young advertising executive's life becomes increasingly complicated when, in order to impress her boss, she pretends to be engaged to a man she has just met.

recommendations.title: Upgraded
recommendations.overview: Ana is an ambitious intern dreaming of a career in the art world while trying to impress her demanding boss Claire. When she's upgraded to first class on a work trip, she meets handsome Will, and Ana pretends to be her boss– a white lie that sets off

recommendations.title: The Year I Started Masturbating
recommendations.overview: Ambitious overachiever Hanna just needs one more kid before her life is perfect. Instead, her baby daddy unexpectedly dumps her. Suddenly, she finds herself without a place to live, job or family. With every fiber of her being set for victory, Hanna

recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: Ajab Prem Ki Ghazab Kahani
recommendations.overview: When his love interest doesn't show up for a meeting, a man and his friends go to Goa in order to find her, where they discover she loves someone else.

recommendations.title: Harriet the Spy
recommendations.overview: When the secret notebook of a young girl who fancies herself a spy is found by her friends, her speculations make her very unpopular! Can she win her friends back?

recommendations.title: The Most Beautiful Girl in the World
recommendations.overview: 17-year-old Cyril is funny, smart and an all-round good guy. Just his somewhat overlarge nose spoils the picture. On a school trip to Berlin with Roxy, a stunning new classmate, Cyril is not the only one taken with her. Benno, the class Casanova has

recommendations.title: Gilda
recommendations.overview: A gambler discovers an old flame while in Argentina, but she's married to his new boss.

recommendations.title: El mesero
recommendations.overview: A waiter pretends to be an important businessman in order to reach the upper class through his entrepreneurial dreams.
